category_sources: Official GitHub README describes go-tpm-tools as TPM 2.0 support tooling.
source_facts.description says this is a CLI for using TPM 2.0.
docs_sources: Official repository README documents go-tpm-tools packages and usage; gotpm is packaged from this official repo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/google/go-tpm-tools; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes TPM 2.0 support library and tooling.
